Name: PUA Enum
Description: Profil avec Enum sans SystemId et Regex Date
ControlSchema: {"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-04/schema","type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"patternProperties":{"#management":{"additionalProperties":false}},"required":["ArchiveUnitProfile","DescriptionLevel","Title","FilePlanPosition"],"properties":{"ArchiveUnitProfile":{"description":"Identifiant du PUA : cardinalité 1","type":"string"},"DescriptionLevel":{"description":"Niveau de description : cardinalité 1","type":"string","enum":["Item"]},"Title":{"pattern":"^Discours_[A-Z]{5,}","description":"Titre de la ressource : cardinalité 1-N","type":"string"},"FilePlanPosition":{"minItems":1,"maxItems":1,"type":"array"},"SystemId":{"minItems":0,"maxItems":1,"type":"array"},"OriginatingSystemId":{"type":"array"},"ArchivalAgencyArchiveUnitIdentifier":{"type":"array"},"OriginatingAgencyArchiveUnitIdentifier":{"type":"array"},"TransferringAgencyArchiveUnitIdentifier":{"type":"array"},"Description":{"type":"string"},"Type":{"type":"string"},"DocumentType":{"type":"string"},"Language":{"type":"array"},"Status":{"type":"string"},"Version":{"type":"string"},"Tag":{"type":"array"},"Keyword":{"type":"array","items":{"additionalProperties":false,"type":"object","properties":{"KeywordType":{"type":"string"},"KeywordContent":{"type":"string"}},"required":["KeywordContent"]}},"Writer":{"type":"array","items":{"additionalProperties":false,"type":"object","properties":{"Role":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"Function":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"Identifier":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"FirstName":{"type":"string"},"Gender":{"type":"string"},"BirthName":{"type":"string"},"DeathDate":{"type":"string"},"BirthDate":{"type":"string"}},"required":["FirstName","BirthDate"]}},"Source":{"type":"string"}}}
